accessibility.text: Our cast will be the faces of real life - unique, relatable, and brimming with character. We're looking for individuals who can bring authenticity to the screen, whose presence feels natural, not staged. They are the everyday heroes, the neighbors, the friends, and the family members who bring our story to life. Typical and unique. Imperfect but positive.
